title: Duck & Fig
description: The one that started it all. Duck, pork, and mission figs, with a whisper of thyme. The sausage that turned an argument into a menu.

title: Charcoal-Grilled Bratwurst
description: Classic for a reason. Pork, beef, onion, and spice, done the traditional way — no gimmicks, just the real thing done right.

title: Twice-Fried Fries
description: Crispy outside, fluffy inside, fried twice just to make sure. Comes with your choice of dip.
